upasargachandrika.example_text: bAlAn (aTarva॰12.4.7) svaDitinA (=kzureRa) prakftya (kO॰sU॰44) alpaSaH kartitvetyarTaH
'gfhRIta baDnIta prakartatemaM pacAma KAdAma ca BImasenam' (BA॰vana॰154.16) prakartata=prakfntata=KaRqaSaH kuruta
'prARApAnAvapakfntAmi' (kO॰sU॰44) apacCinadmi
'yAni mAMsAni saMskftya sannyAsuH' (Sa॰brA॰3.1.3.4) saMskftya=KaRqaSaH kartitvA=CittvA
'evamuktvA tu gAnDArI kurURAmavakartanam apaSyattatra tizWantI sarvaM divyena cakzuzA..' (BA0 strI0 161) avakartanaM yudDaBUmiH
'sandaryAgre svaBAryAyAH karRanAsAvakartanam' (rAja0 7892) avakartanaM karRanAsasyEkadeSasya kartanam avaSabda uttarapadArTasya kriyAyA asAkalyamAcazwe prAyeRetyasakfduktamaDastAt
'iyaM vastrAvakartena saMvItA cAruhAsinI' (BA0 vana0 6222) vastrAvakarto vastraKaRqaH
'kfzRAjinagrIvA evAvakftya pratyAnahyati' (Sa 0 brA0 3348) avakftya=apacCidya
'nijaGnuH paramezvAsAH sarvAMstAnniSitEH SarEH AgarBAdavakfntantaH…' (BA0 Adi0 17819-20) avakfpA kopo Bavati avaSabdo'rTaviparyAsakft kfpAyA apakarzamaBAvaM vA''ha
'ya usriyA apyA antaraSmano nirgA akfntadojasA' (f0 91086) nirakfntat=niramokzayat
'tasya taM SalyaM nirakfntat' (Sa0 brA0 1744) nirakfntat=udaharat
'…karaM devI Kaqgena nirakfntat' (durgA0 332) nirakfntat niracCidat
'tasmAdasya yatrEva kva ca kuSo vA yadvA vikfntati tata eva lohitamutpatati' (Sa0 brA0 31216) vikfntati Izac Cinatti viSabdo'lpIBAve
'indro valaM rakzitAraM duGAnAM kareReva vi cakartA raveRa' (f0 10676) vicakarta=KaRqaSaScakAra SakalAni cakAra
'vi parvaSaScakarta gAmivAsiH' (f0 10796) ukto'rTaH
'kuYjarAn kuYjarArohAn padAtIn raTino raTAn AplutyAplutya daSanErnaKESca vicakartire' (rA0 61910)..
'hata praharatABItA viDyata vyavakfntata' (BA0 droRa0 1619) KaRqaSaH kurutetyarTaH
'tezAM gudeByaScAntrARi vinizkfntanti' (vAmana0 1225) nizkfzya kfntantItyarTaH
'vinikfttAni dfSyante SarIrARi SirAMsi ca' (BA0 vana0 16053) vinikfttAni KaRqitAni SakalIkftAni
'kzAlayannapi vfkzANGrInnadIvego nikfntati' (hitopa0 459) nikfntati mUlocCedaM karoti
'nikfnta CinDi BinDIti paravarmAvakartanam' (BA0 ASva0 374) nikfnta samUlamudDara
'viSvAsAdBayamutpannaM mUlAnyapi nikfntati' (paYcata0 239) niSabdo niHSezatve
'BallanikfttakaRWEH' (raGu0 758)
'yAni SaptAni gehAni nikfttAnIva kftyayA' (BA0 anu0 467)
'etAnnikftya DImAn bARasaNGEratandritaH' (BA0 ASva0 313) nikftya CittvA
'nikartanamivAtyugraM lANgUlasya mahAhariH' (BA0 droRa0 17025) spazworTaH
'utsAdanamamitrARAM parasenAnikartanam' (BA0 vana0 16755) nikartanaM nisUdanaM nibarhaRaM kadanam
'nikartane devane yo'dvitIyaH' (BA0 u0 3028) nikartane'rTApahAre
'idamahaM rakzaso grIvA apikfntAmi' (vE0 saM0 125) apikfntAmi apakfntAmi
'vAgapi gacCatu' (aTarva0 2128) apigacCatu apyetu
'DArzwadyumneH sa SiraScoccakarta' (BA0 karRa0 829) uccakarta uccicCeda
'tvaca utkartamavapAkAnAM saMvraScamozaDivanaspatInAm' (Sa0 brA0 13719) utkartamutkfttya Ramulantam
'svayaM vA SiSnavfzaRAvutkftya' (manu0 11104) utkfttya apacCidya
'etasya (mfgasya) utkfttyamAnasya' (hitopa0) SakalIkriyamARasya
'yaTA SrAnto'vimucyamAna utkftyeta' (E0 brA0 623) utkftyeta hIyeta kzIyeta
'fSyasyeva pariSAsaM parikftya pari tvacaH' (aTarva0 5143) parikftya paritaH kartitvA paricCidya
'gaRAnnaM gaRikAnnaM ca lokeByaH parikfntati' (manu0 4219) parikfntati pfTakkaroti vyAvartayatItyarTaH
'aNgAni mA parikartIH' (SAM0 brA0 104) aNgaBaNgaM mA kArzIH viSasanaM mA sma karoH
'AwopaSUlO parikartikA ca' (suSruta0 uttara0 a0 55) parikartikA kartanavat pIqA
'apfzwvA budDisampannAn vEdyAnvAnaracApalAt yatkiYcanapralApI tvaM vAkSarErupakfntasi' (rA0 4185).. upakfntasi tudasi viDyasi nirRayasAgaramudrite pustake vAkSarErupakfntasIti nAsti
